relationships: ber:D netta ad yilin d amasay ɣef krayellan
ber:Yetteddu krayellan akken iwata deg umahil﹖
ber:Ulac amiji dakken ad d-yales i krayellan seg swadda
ber:Layla ur tessin ara krayellan ɣef Sami
ber:Tussna ur tezmir ara ad d-tessegzu krayellan
ber:Ulac aɣilif ma teǧǧam-iyi d nekk ara d-yelhun s krayellan﹖
ber:Sami iḥemmel ad d-yeccetki ɣef krayellan
ber:Deg yiwen n wass asneɣnay, tameddit, krayellan ibeddel
ber:Deg yiwen n wass asneɣnay, tameddit, krayellan yenfel
ber:Ulac aɣilif ma teǧǧamt-iyi d nekk ara d-yelhun s krayellan﹖
ber:Ulac aɣilif ma teǧǧid-iyi d nekk ara d-yelhun s krayellan﹖
ber:Yanni yessen krayellan ɣef Zzayer Tamaneɣt
ber:Ǧǧemt-iyi d nekk ara d-yelhun s krayellan, ma ulac aɣilif
ber:Deg Zzayer Tamaneɣt, Yanni ittettu krayellan
ber:Ǧǧet-iyi d nekk ara d-yelhun s krayellan, ma ulac aɣilif
